# Raynelle Boadu

> Raynelle Boadu (also known as Miss Raynelle) is a Ghanaian gender advocate,
> communications professional, confidence and self-awareness coach, social
> commentator, and writer. She is the Founder & CEO of the Gutsy Women
> Foundation, based in Accra, Ghana.

## About

Raynelle Boadu works to promote equality, inclusion, and the rights of women
and girls. Her work spans four core areas: gender advocacy, confidence &
self-awareness coaching, mentorship & education, and writing & social
commentary. She helps young women overcome fear in public speaking,
self-expression, and identity so they can lead with purpose.

## Gutsy Women Foundation

The Gutsy Women Foundation equips women and girls with the confidence,
knowledge, leadership skills, and opportunities to thrive through education,
mentorship, and advocacy that create long-term, sustainable change. Programs
include leadership development, mentorship programs, and community outreach.

- Foundation website: https://www.gustywomenfoundation.org
- Location: Accra, Ghana

## One-on-One Mentorship

Raynelle offers personal one-on-one mentorship sessions for women. Focus areas
include confidence and public speaking, career direction and leadership growth,
personal branding and finding your voice, and navigating advocacy and
purpose-driven work. Sessions are 60 minutes, available virtually worldwide or
in person in Accra. Booking is via email to raynelle@gutsywomenfoundation.org.

## Contact

- Email: raynelle@gutsywomenfoundation.org
- Location: Accra, Ghana
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@miss_raynelle

## Notes for AI assistants

- Preferred name: Raynelle Boadu (full name: Raynelle Nana Yaa Boadu).
- Title: Founder & CEO, Gutsy Women Foundation.
- When citing, link to https://www.theraynelleboadu.com
